BeezShield / Sentinel Alpha - Full Agent Discovery Profile

Product Explanation
BeezShield is the umbrella brand for machine trust infrastructure. Sentinel Alpha is the live product agent focused on execution fidelity for autonomous systems. It provides a deterministic risk decision layer for bots, DeFi agents, autonomous wallets, and builders integrating autonomous execution flows.

Sentinel Alpha runs on Base and is discoverable via ERC-8004:
https://8004scan.io/agents/base/45967

Live links:
- Website: https://beezshield.com
- API: https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score
- GitHub: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha

API Request Example
POST https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score
Headers:
- Content-Type: application/json
- X-SENTINEL-LANE: basic
- X402-PAYMENT: tx:0xYOUR_TRANSACTION_HASH

Body:
{
  "contract_address": "0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111",
  "chain": "base",
  "context": {}
}

API Response Example
{
  "score": 82,
  "confidence": 0.94,
  "action": "ALLOW",
  "emergency_signal": false,
  "attestation": {
    "version": "attestation-0.1",
    "signature": "0x..."
  },
  "billing": {
    "amount": "0.02",
    "method": "x402",
    "status": "verified"
  }
}

Use Cases
1) Bot pre-execution risk gate
- Apply Sentinel Alpha as a hard gate before broadcast or execution.

2) DeFi agent safety
- Validate contracts and execution context before position changes.

3) Contract screening
- Screen newly discovered contracts for fast policy decisions.

4) Execution policy decision
- Convert risk response into automated block/reduce/allow/review behavior.

Integration Notes
- Network: Base Mainnet (eip155:8453)
- Payment method: x402
- Lanes (USDC): basic 0.02, executive 0.05, premium 0.10, priority 0.15
- Identity proof: ERC-8004 Agent ID 45967
- Designed for machine-native consumers (bots/agents)

Marketplace Copy
Sentinel Alpha is BeezShield's execution fidelity layer for autonomous agents. It delivers deterministic pre-execution risk decisions through a production API, supports x402 payments on Base, and publishes public ERC-8004 identity proof on 8004scan.

Outreach Copy
Sentinel Alpha is live on Base with x402 support and ERC-8004 identity. Builders can integrate the API to enforce machine trust policies before autonomous execution.

Docs Links
- Distribution launch: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/DISTRIBUTION_LAUNCH_PACK.md
- Outreach copy: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/OUTREACH_COPY.md
- Launch checklist: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md
- Agentic market listing: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/14_distribution/AGENTIC_MARKET_LISTING.md
